statement.en: Pure Computation and Governed Mutation: Capability Transforms and Side Effects in Protocol-Governed Systems
statement.summary: This paper formalizes the architectural separation between pure computation and governed mutation in protocol-governed systems. Building on the execution model defined in Paper 6 [Bachi, 2026f], it specifies the semantic boundary between Capability Transforms (CT_) and Capability Side Effects (CS_).

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom is a provisional formalization of architectural principles in protocol-governed systems. It references a concurrent paper (Paper 6, dated 2026-04-25) and establishes semantic boundaries that require validation against implemented systems. The framework is internally coherent but lacks empirical validation, peer review acceptance, or demonstrated computational precedent in published literature. Status: preprint/under-validation paradigm.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: プロトコル πの下で、純粋な変換と統治された突然変異は直交し、システムの相位はただ測定可能な変異の積分として現れる。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs>.pure{stroke:#00d4ff;stroke-width:2;fill:none} .mut{stroke:#ec4899;stroke-width:2;fill:none} .bridge{stroke:#7c3aed;stroke-width:1.5;stroke-dasharray:3,2}</defs><circle class='pure' cx='25' cy='50' r='15'/><circle class='mut' cx='75' cy='50' r='15'/><path class='bridge' d='M 40 50 L 60 50'/><rect class='bridge' x='35' y='40' width='30' height='20' fill='none' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='1' opacity='0.4'/><text x='50' y='75' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#7c3aed' font-family='mono'>π</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 左の青い純粋な計算領域と右のピンク色の統治された変異が、プロトコルの紫の橋で分離され、仲介される。
